title: RUNAWAY AND HOMELESS YOUTH LAW
doc_html:
CHAPTER 13.  RUNAWAY AND HOMELESS YOUTH LAW

§1351.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Runaway and Homeless Youth Law".  

Acts 1989, No. 803, §1, eff. July 11, 1989.
